visual_thesis: Precise Apple-like support editorial: bright neutral surfaces, oversized centered hero type, compact system navigation, and calm blue text actions.
css_strategy: Single plain CSS file scoped by theme classes and loaded from the theme layout.
font_stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", "SF Pro Display", "PingFang SC", "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei UI", "Microsoft YaHei", "Segoe UI", sans-serif
